content:
I don't know what to do; I've been abused my whole life; I need less than a year to get this second act together, and I cannot abide ever working for some Starbucks or bagel store and waste my life again; I don't mind working for individuals, in fact, on my way back to NYC just this time, I told my mother I would build her application and website to use for her real estate business she is putting together;

----
----

The author experienced a severe Xanax withdrawal reaction, leading to a life-altering fall and subsequent loss of job, apartment, and car. After moving back to Staten Island and then Florida, they faced family challenges, including abuse and lack of support, while trying to pursue their goals. Now, they are struggling to find stability and purpose, seeking a way to avoid returning to a mundane job and instead focusing on their personal and professional aspirations.

  • Life Event: The author had a severe Xanax withdrawal reaction, resulting in a suicide attempt and serious injuries.
  • Current Situation: The author is living with their mother in Staten Island after losing their job, apartment, and car.
context: From document: Title: Surviving Collapse — chunk 3 (chunk 3/4)
